
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for Li2 w. bond length 5.4 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...
Built molecule Li2 with basis 6-31G and bond length 5.4 Angstrom.
Number of electrons: 6, Number of orbitals: 18
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 11 active virtual orbitals (out of 15 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -14.841834688412408 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.024567458403652792 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).


Running VQE optimization with SlowQuant using OVOS-optimized orbitals as reference...
OVOS optimized energy = -15.736079 Hartree @ iterations 74.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...
UHF energy = -15.734637 Hartree @ iterations 44.

Calculating UMP2 natural orbitals for comparison...
UMP2 natural orbitals are restricted (RHF-like).
UHF natural orbital energy = -15.739926 Hartree @ iterations 56.
